title: Noir Metro Edge Deskmat
description: Features: - 90 x 40 x 0,4cm - Smooth cloth top - Stitched edges - Rubber bottom, anti-slip - Water-proof surface Shrinkage of ±1-2cm is within tolerance due to fabric & material process. Actual products may present slight differences in appearance due to lighting conditions and other variables. *Citron (Grade B) variant have a small defect on printing where it's written "Zest" instead of "Citron" on the deskmat *Actual products may present slight differences in appearance due to lighting conditions

title: Noir Wave Series Deskmat
description: Spesifikasi: - Ukuran lebar 900x400x4mm - Bahan atas: Kain microfiber halus anti air, mudah dibersihkan, tidak perlu khawatir cairan tumpah - Bahan bawah: Alas karet anti selip, tidak mudah bergeser dipermukaan licin - Permukaan untuk KECEPATAN dan KONTROL - Mendukung full-size keyboard dan mouse

title: Noir Alpine Bloom Deskmat
description: Spesifikasi : - Ukuran lebar 900x400x4mm - Bahan atas: Kain microfiber halus tahan air dan mudah dibersihkan, tidak perlu khawatir saat terkena cairan - Bahan bawah: Alas karet anti selip, tidak mudah bergeser di permukaan licin - Permukaan untuk KECEPATAN dan KONTROL - Mendukung full-size keyboard dan mouse
